scenarios.title: ERP Period-End Batch Recovery
scenarios.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA · Month-End Close
scenarios.blastRadius: Finance team · 847 work processes · Month-end close
scenarios.reversibility: Fully reversible · Original schedule restores automatically

outcome.result: SAP S/4HANA work processes restored — month-end close unaffected — finance team unaware of incident

steps.label: Alert Correlation
steps.summary: Work process saturation signal from SAP Cloud ALM correlated with 847 Prometheus metrics

events.msg: SAP Cloud ALM WP utilisation alert received — PRD-S4H-APP01 at 89% dialog WP
Correlating with 847 Prometheus metrics — dialog pool trend analysis
Pattern matched: month-end batch WP class mismatch — confidence 94%

steps.label: RCA Analysis
steps.summary: Root cause identified: 12 batch jobs allocated to dialog WP class competing with 1,200 user sessions

events.msg: Querying SM37 — identifying batch jobs in dialog WP class
12 batch jobs found in dialog class — should be background class
Dialog pool impact: 1,200 user sessions + 12 batch jobs = 89% utilisation
Root cause confirmed: WP class misconfiguration. Confidence: 94%

steps.label: Job Rescheduling
steps.summary: 12 batch jobs rescheduled from dialog to background WP class via SM37

events.msg: Preparing SM37 batch job rescheduling — 12 jobs identified
Risk score: 16/100 — fully reversible — proceeding autonomously
Rescheduling job FI_PERIOD_CLOSE_01 to background WP class
All 12 jobs rescheduled — dialog WP pool dropping
Dialog pool: 89% → 41% — month-end close proceeding normally

steps.label: WP Release
steps.summary: SM04 session cleanup executed — stale work processes released

events.msg: SM04 session analysis — identifying stale dialog sessions
14 stale sessions identified — executing cleanup
WP pool stable at 38% — all legitimate sessions active

steps.label: Validation
steps.summary: Month-end close validation — all FI posting runs confirmed active

events.msg: Validating FI_PERIOD_CLOSE job sequence — all 12 jobs running in background
Dialog pool stable — no user impact recorded during incident window
Finance team proactively notified — no service disruption experienced

steps.label: Close & Learn
steps.summary: INC0001001 closed — KEDB updated — preventive monitoring rule added

events.msg: Adding automated WP class validation rule — fires before every period-end batch
KEDB updated — WP saturation pattern KB-ERP-001 created
INC0001001 closed in ServiceNow — MTTR: 3m 48s — P1 SLA met

scenarios.title: Multi-System Access — SoD Conflict
scenarios.subtitle: ERP + Finance · Human-in-the-Loop
scenarios.blastRadius: Finance user access · SAP payment cycle · Regulatory compliance
scenarios.reversibility: Reversible · Role assignment can be modified. SoD violation requires compensating controls.
scenarios.whyHitl: Requested roles create a payment cycle SoD violation — AP invoice approval combined with vendor master edit access. Risk score 68 — above autonomous threshold. Regulatory compliance requires documented human approval with compensating controls.

outcome.result: Access provisioned with compensating controls — SoD violation mitigated — full audit trail in SAP GRC and ServiceNow
outcome.saved: ~60h vs manual SoD review + provisioning queue

remediationPlan.act: SR received from ServiceNow — eligibility and completeness check
SoD check via SAP GRC API — payment cycle violation detected
HiTL raised to line manager — SoD detail, risk assessment, suggested controls
Manager approves with compensating controls — AP limit €25K, dual-control
Role provisioning across 4 systems — GRC updated — ServiceNow closed

steps.label: SR Validation
steps.summary: SR-GEN-00443 received — completeness check — eligibility confirmed

events.msg: SR-GEN-00443 received — M.Petrov — Finance Analyst — ERP AP roles requested
Completeness check passed — manager approval confirmed — business justification present

steps.label: SoD Check
steps.summary: SAP GRC SoD check — payment cycle violation detected — risk 68

events.msg: Initiating SAP GRC SoD check — requested roles: AP_APPROVER + VENDOR_MASTER_EDIT
⚠ SoD Conflict 1: AP invoice approval + AP payment execution — payment cycle violation
⚠ SoD Conflict 2: Vendor master edit + AP invoice approval — vendor fraud risk
Risk score: 68/100 — above autonomous threshold 25 — HiTL required

steps.label: Human Decision
steps.summary: HiTL raised to S.Chen (Finance Director) — 13 seconds to approve

events.msg: HiTL notification sent to S.Chen — Teams + Email — full SoD detail included
S.Chen reviewing — 2 violations, suggested controls, risk assessment
✓ Approved with controls: AP limit €25K · Dual-control for payments > €10K · Quarterly audit

steps.label: Provisioning
steps.summary: Roles provisioned across 4 systems — GRC updated with compensating controls

events.msg: Provisioning AP_APPROVER + VENDOR_MASTER_EDIT with control constraints
SAP GRC risk register updated — compensating controls documented
Azure AD group membership updated — access active within 5 minutes
M.Petrov notified — access active — control constraints communicated

steps.label: Audit & Close
steps.summary: Full audit trail in SAP GRC and ServiceNow — SR closed — 12m 34s total

events.msg: GRC audit entry created — SoD violation, approver, controls, justification logged
SR-GEN-00443 closed in ServiceNow — MTTR: 12m 34s — SLA met

scenarios.title: CI/CD Build Farm Recovery
scenarios.subtitle: Jenkins · Disk Capacity Automation
scenarios.blastRadius: 34 queued builds · 8 development teams · Build SLA
scenarios.reversibility: Fully reversible · Artefact cleanup is non-destructive (retention policy enforced)

outcome.result: Jenkins build farm disk cleared — 38GB freed — 34 queued builds released — engineering teams unaffected

steps.label: Detection
steps.summary: Datadog disk threshold alert on Jenkins agent-04 — 91% utilisation

events.msg: Datadog disk alert: JENKINS-AGT-04 at 91% — threshold 85%
Build failure rate increasing — 34 jobs queued — 3 agents offline
Root cause pattern matched: artefact retention policy not applied — confidence 97%

steps.label: Artefact Analysis
steps.summary: Config drift confirmed — agent-04 missed retention policy in August deployment

events.msg: Scanning artefact directories — identifying eligible cleanup candidates
47.2GB artefacts found — 38.4GB eligible (> 14 days, no active references)
Config drift confirmed: agent-04 retention policy not applied since August 2025
Cleanup plan ready — risk score 12 — proceeding autonomously

steps.label: Cleanup Execution
steps.summary: 38GB artefacts removed — disk from 91% to 52%

events.msg: Executing artefact cleanup — removing 38.4GB eligible artefacts
Cleanup progress: 50% — disk at 72%
Cleanup complete — disk at 52% — 34 queued builds released
Build queue clearing — all 8 development teams unaffected

steps.label: Policy Enforcement
steps.summary: Retention policy applied to agent-04 via Ansible — config drift resolved

events.msg: Applying retention policy to JENKINS-AGT-04 via Ansible playbook
Retention policy active — auto-cleanup scheduled daily at 02:00
CMDB updated — agent-04 config drift resolved

steps.label: Validation
steps.summary: All 34 queued builds released and running — build success rate validated

events.msg: Monitoring build queue — 34 jobs released and executing
Build success rate: 94% — within normal range

steps.label: Close & Prevent
steps.summary: INC0001003 closed — KEDB updated — daily disk check added

events.msg: Adding ZeroOps daily disk threshold check across all Jenkins agents
KEDB updated — artefact retention drift pattern KB-ENG-001
INC0001003 closed — MTTR: 4m 12s — P2 SLA met

scenarios.title: EDI Gateway — Problem Management
scenarios.subtitle: Supply Chain · Recurring Pattern → Fix Pipeline
scenarios.blastRadius: EDI gateway · 12 trading partners · Supply chain operations
scenarios.reversibility: Development change — tested in non-production before deployment
scenarios.whyHitl: Problem record creation and code fix pipeline initiation requires confirmation that the recurring pattern justifies engineering effort and production code change. Change Manager sign-off required before AI SDLC pipeline is triggered.

outcome.result: PRB-ENT-00024 raised — AI SDLC pipeline triggered — EDI reconnection defect fix in development

remediationPlan.act: Correlate INC0001002 and 2 prior EDI incidents — confirm recurring pattern
Human sign-off — confirm PRB-ENT-00024 warrants permanent code fix
Raise PRB-ENT-00024 in ServiceNow — link 3 incidents — root cause documented
Trigger AI SDLC pipeline — EDI gateway reconnection defect fix
Hand to Jenkins — CHG-4821 queued for deployment after testing

steps.label: Pattern Detection
steps.summary: 3 EDI gateway incidents in 8 weeks — same root cause pattern confirmed

events.msg: Analysing incident history — searching for EDI gateway recurring patterns
Found: INC0001002 (today), INC0000912 (6w ago), INC0000731 (14w ago) — same root cause
Pattern confirmed: bulk reconnection defect in EDI gateway v3.2.1
Estimated impact if unresolved: P1 incident every 6 weeks — £4,200 per incident

steps.label: Human Sign-Off
steps.summary: Change Manager approves problem record and AI SDLC pipeline activation

events.msg: PRB-ENT-00024 draft prepared — 3 incidents, root cause, fix recommendation
HiTL raised to Change Manager — full evidence pack included
Change Manager reviewing — 3 incidents, cost of recurrence, fix scope
✓ Approved — PRB-ENT-00024 confirmed — AI SDLC pipeline authorised

steps.label: Problem Record
steps.summary: PRB-ENT-00024 raised in ServiceNow — 3 incidents linked — KEDB entry created

events.msg: PRB-ENT-00024 created in ServiceNow — Problem Management workflow active
INC0001002, INC0000912, INC0000731 linked to problem record
KEDB entry created — EDI gateway bulk reconnection defect documented

steps.label: AI SDLC Trigger
steps.summary: AI SDLC pipeline triggered — requirements generated — code fix in progress

events.msg: AI SDLC pipeline activated — EDI gateway reconnection defect fix
Requirements Agent: fix specification generated — sequential reconnection logic
Build Agent: code fix generated — PR #1142 raised — unit tests passing
Test Agent: 96% test coverage — integration tests against EDI test harness

steps.label: Pipeline Handoff
steps.summary: CHG-4821 queued for Jenkins — deployment to non-production for validation

events.msg: CHG-4821 created in ServiceNow — linked to PRB-ENT-00024
Jenkins pipeline triggered — non-production deployment initiated
Handoff to Release Management — production deployment subject to UAT sign-off
